title: Analytics - Device Deleted
scenario: Analytics event for device removal in Poly Studio Mobile app does not log Device Name, PID, and Serial fields
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure at least one Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
Note the Device Name, Device PID, and Device Serial shown on the Device Settings screen.
Navigate to the phone's system Bluetooth settings and unpair / forget the device.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
Verify the device no longer appears in the device list.
Wait a few hours for Firebase Analytics to process and update event counts.
Open the Firebase Analytics console and navigate to the relevant event (e.g., device_removed).
Check that the analytics page displays default elements: graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version/build/environment.
Check that the analytics page also displays device-specific fields: Device Name, Device PID, and Device Serial.
Compare the event count for related elements before and after the removal to confirm the count incremented.
expected: Firebase Analytics page shows default elements (graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version/build/environment) plus device-specific fields (Device Name, Device PID, Device Serial). The event count for the device removal event increments after a few hours.
